arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest transfer news: Brazilian winger being chased by several Premier League clubs?
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are allegedly among a number of Premier League clubs who are plotting a move for a Marseille winger during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United next five fixtures compared to Champions League rivals after Nottingham Forest win
arts.sum: Newcastle United boosted their hopes of playing Champions League football next season by edging a seven-goal thriller at St James' Park against Nottingham Forest. Eddie Howe’s side were, however, level before half time when Lewis Miley finished well past Matz Sels in his first league start of the season.

arts.ttl: Lewis Miley issues perfect response to Jamie Carragher after 'big moment' against Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Ahead of the game against Forest, Carragher, who was covering the game as a pundit for Sky Sports seem to be surprised at the player not kicking on after making 30 appearances in all competitions last season. Newcastle United midfielder Lewis Miley has responded to comments from pundit Jamie Carragher in the perfect way against Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Newcastle 4-3 Nottingham Forest: Player ratings & talking points from St James' Park epic
arts.sum: Player ratings and analysis from Newcastle's thrilling 4-3 win over Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Newcastle resist Nottingham Forest fightback to triumph in seven-goal thriller
arts.sum: The Magpies had to withstand a concerted comeback to close the gap on the visitors.

arts.ttl: The fastest players to 50 Premier League goals as Isak reaches half-century
arts.sum: Alexander Isak is celebrating a milestone moment after scoring twice in the first half of Newcastle’s clash with Nottingham Forest. Isak bagged a brace as Newcastle recovered from a goal down to lead 4-1 at half-time. The Swedish striker’s double has seen him reach 50 goals in the Premier League. Isak has been a huge […] The post The fastest players to 50 Premier League goals as Isak reaches half-century first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Micah Richards' one-word Alexander Isak quip sums up Newcastle sentiment amid transfer links
arts.sum: Newcastle United fans have made their feelings clear about ongoing transfer talk surrounding their main man this season, with Arsenal and Liverpool among those linked with the Swedish striker. Sky Sports pundit Micah Richards delivered a one-word quip when presented with the opportunity to talk about Alexander Isak possibly departing St James' Park this summer.

arts.ttl: Journalist shares real reason why Danilo is missing from Nottingham Forest squad to face Newcastle United
Premier League issue statement as controversy strikes Newcastle vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Newcastle were awarded a penalty in the first-half of their clash with Nottingham Forest for a handball against Ola Aina, with VAR intervening to hand the Magpies the spot-kick

arts.ttl: Guimaraes has exit ‘pact’ with Newcastle ahead of summer
arts.sum: Bruno Guimaraes reportedly has a ‘pact’ allowing him to leave Newcastle for £85m this summer, if the club fail to secure Champions League qualification. Guimaraes is understood to be on Manchester City’s radar for the summer transfer window and the Citizens are hopeful of reaching an agreement.
